hypothesis: For diffusion-model-based 3D molecular generation, integrating adaptive diversity constraints that penalize over-represented 3D conformer clusters (measured by inter-molecule RMSD clustering) and stereochemical motif frequency will preserve at least 80% of initial conformational diversity (defined as the count of unique RMSD clusters) during property-targeted optimization while reducing the rate of predicted-property improvement by no more than 10% compared to unconstrained optimization.
